'''K-X12a''' was a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] that was owned by the [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Tanis Venn]] in [[3956 BBY]]. It had been reprogrammed by Venn to help during his hunts for [[Wraid|desert wraid]]. It was sabotaged by Venn's wife, [[Marlena Venn|Marlena]], in order to make it explode if Tanis left the place where the droids surrounded him. [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] repaired the droid, freeing Tanis, who rewarded him with a number of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].

==Behind the scenes==
The player, as Revan, has a number of options when dealing with Tanis's predicament. He can either leave Tanis to rot or cause the droids to explode deliberately; both of these actions result in a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] alignment shift. If the player chooses to help him, it is possible to fix the droid by solving a logic puzzle, or to simply use repair parts.
